earliest_docs.label: Late Meiji-Taisho state-building and managed social incorporation
New Liberalism and prewar welfare reforms (UK)
Late Raj constitutional devolution and state-building (India)
Fascist corporatist state and state-directed capitalism (Italy)
Popular Front social reform and railway nationalisation (France)
France Trente Glorieuses: indicative planning and dirigisme
Italy Christian Democrat partitocrazia and state-holding system
Attlee government: welfare state and nationalisations (UK)
France separation of Church and State 1905

publishers.notes: Not a publisher — provenance marker for variables whose values are taken directly from a published academic paper or working paper. Citation MUST appear in the hypothesis evidence block.
Spanish tax agency. Wealth-tax (patrimonio) and income-tax statistics. Fetcher TBD.
German think-tank — high-frequency German + EU electricity-system tracker (Agorameter). Fetcher TBD.

Australian Superannuation forced-saving data.
MANUAL-DROP pattern: drop file(s) into data/manual/apra/ and call data.fetchers.apra.fetch().

Swiss-cantonal economic indicators (per-capita GDP, employment shares, regulation intensity) sourced from BAK Economics regional forecasts and KOF (ETH Zurich) Globalisation Index + cantonal regulation index. BAK is a paid-research firm so cantonal series ship as XLSX previews behind a press / media-room flow; KOF series are free but the kof.ethz.ch download URLs rotate per release. Both handled as MANUAL-DROP: drop file(s) into data/manual/bak_swiss/<series_id>/ and call data.fetchers.bak_swiss.fetch(series_id). Schema target: country_iso3=CHE, region_code (CH-XX ISO-3166-2), year, value. Cross-reference with swiss_fso for canton GDP/demographics underlay.
Korean central bank ECOS API (free key). Monetary, FX, real-economy series. Fetcher TBD.
Colombian central bank. Monetary aggregates, FX, policy rates. Fetcher TBD.

BCRA Estadisticas Monetarias REST API v3.0 (JSON). Argentina's central bank: monetary base, M2/M3, international reserves, FX rates, policy rates (Leliq/Pases/Tasa Politica), and BCRA-published monthly inflation. SSL chain is periodically out-of-date; fetcher disables verification and suppresses the urllib3 InsecureRequestWarning. Canonical source for the hyperinflation / fiscal-dominance / Peronism-cycle hypothesis family, bypassing the IMF-WEO attenuation caused by the 2007-2015 INDEC falsification period.
Venezuelan central bank monetary aggregates. Post-2016 publications became sporadic; Hanke and DolarToday are credibility checks. Tier 3 reflects regime-era reliability concerns.
Stats.bis.org SDMX 2.1 v2 API with CSV output. Client passes dataflow name as series_id (WS_SPP, WS_LONG_PP, WS_EER, WS_TC). Full dataflow fetched by default; optional SDMX dot-path key narrows.
Sovereign yield-curve and CDS quotes pulled from Bloomberg Terminal. Subscription only; requires manual export. Used for sovereign-debt hypotheses where FRED/ECB coverage is thin.
US Labor deep: detailed CPI, PPI, employment by industry/state, earnings, productivity. Optional free API key via BLS_API_KEY env var for higher rate limits.
German electricity market data via SMARD download centre. Fetcher TBD.
IADB CSV endpoint. Requires browser-shaped User-Agent (Akamai check). Series codes like LPMAUYM (M4, monthly).
Bank of Ghana monetary statistics. Fetcher TBD.

Money-statistics landing page returned 200 but shipped no direct CSV links — BoJ's stat-search is form-driven with session state. Deferred to scrape round; JPN M2 substitute available via FRED mirror (series JPNM2MB) at publisher_id=fred for interim use.
MANUAL-DROP pattern: drop file(s) into data/manual/boj/ and call data.fetchers.boj.fetch().
Brazilian National Treasury fiscal statistics. Monthly fiscal accounts, gross/net debt. Fetcher TBD.
German Federal Archives. Used as primary-source citation for historical-narrative case studies (Weimar, GDR). Manual access; not a numeric API.
Egyptian national statistics. Fetcher TBD.
Central Bank of Egypt monetary and FX statistics. Fetcher TBD.
CB Insights startup and venture analytics. Subscription only. Manual extracts.
Russian central bank. Tier 3 reflects post-2022 sanctions-era reporting opacity. Fetcher TBD.
Sri Lankan central bank. Used in 2022 default / hyperinflation-adjacent case study. Fetcher TBD.
CEPAL/ECLAC statistics portal. LatAm-wide harmonised macro and social indicators. Fetcher TBD.

Chilean AFP forced-saving pension data.
MANUAL-DROP pattern: drop file(s) into data/manual/chile_spensiones/ and call data.fetchers.chile_spensiones.fetch().

De jure capital-account-openness index built from four IMF AREAER binary indicators (multiple FX, current-acct restrictions, capital-acct restrictions, surrender of export proceeds). 2023 release covers 1970-2023, ~180 economies. Stata .dta format. Falls back to manual drop at data/manual/chinn_ito/ if the PDX host is unavailable. Mirrored by OWID as `owid:capital-account-openness` — this entry is the canonical upstream.
CIA World Factbook country profiles. Used as fallback for hard-to-source basic indicators. Fetcher TBD.
Crunchbase startup database. Subscription API. Fetcher TBD.

Hand-curated Cuba-specific series (libreta persistence, monetary regime events, MLC retail) backed by academic monographs (Mesa-Lago) and Cuban official-gazette regulations. Each series has a provenance markdown file under data/manual/cuba/ documenting the citation. See data/manual/cuba/_provenance.md for the index.
Not a publisher — provenance marker for treatment dates / regime-change dates that are pinned to a documented narrative source rather than a numeric series.
Sri Lankan national statistics. Fetcher TBD.
Not a publisher — provenance marker indicating the variable is computed in-script from already-fetched inputs. Use only when the recipe is documented in the hypothesis YAML or its coding doc.

German national statistics (GENESIS-Online REST 2020). Defaults to GAST guest auth; set GENESIS_USER + GENESIS_PASS for higher quotas / restricted tables. Supported tables include 42153 (industrial production), 61111 (CPI), 81000 (GDP), 62121 (earnings), 13231 (labour-force participation, Mikrozensus).
Colombian tax authority. Patrimonio (wealth tax) declared base, monthly tax collections. Fetcher TBD.
Parallel-market USD/VES rate during Venezuelan currency controls. Used as a market-based cross-check on official BCV rate during the 2013-2021 hyperinflation episode.
EBRD transition indicators and country-level data. Fetcher TBD.

SDMX 2.1 CSV API. Ships euro-area aggregate flows cleanly (BSI M3/M2 for U2, EXR bilateral rates, MIR interest rates). National- contribution keys (e.g. REF_AREA=DE for national M2 contribution) require per-country resolution against the live constraint set; resolve at hypothesis-wiring time.

EU environmental indicators. Two series wired: eu_ets_verified_emissions (data hub item 9d3fbb4f-...) and greenhouse_gas_inventory (4b8d1744-...). Bulk CSVs ship from sdi.eea.europa.eu / discomap; fetcher tries an ordered candidate list and falls back to a bootstrap-stub row if all URLs are unreachable (extra.bootstrap=True flag for auditability).
European wholesale energy and emissions exchange. Spot and futures prices for EUA, power, gas. Subscription / market-data terms. Fetcher TBD.
US EIA Open Data API v2 (JSON). Energy production, consumption, prices, electricity, petroleum. Free API key required.
Hand-curated comparative table of EMA vs FDA approval timelines and outcomes used in regulatory-friction hypotheses. Source files compiled per-hypothesis; no single endpoint.
Chilean state oil company financials and operations. Fetcher TBD.
Independent Venezuelan living-conditions survey run by UCAB (Universidad Catolica Andres Bello) as substitute for INE-Venezuela household survey suspended in 2014. Manual-drop publisher.
European electricity TSOs transparency platform. Generation, load, cross-border flows, day-ahead prices. Free API key. Fetcher TBD.
EPO Open Patent Services API. Free key. Used in patenting/innovation hypotheses. Fetcher TBD.

EU KLEMS productivity & growth accounts (LUISS-hosted release). Industry-level TFP, labour, capital. Fetcher tries auto-download of the bulk zip from euklems-intanprod-llee.luiss.it; falls back to manual-drop in data/manual/eu_klems/ (zip/xlsx/xls/csv accepted) if the URL changes between vintages.
JSON-stat 2.0 API. EU27 deep coverage across 200+ datasets (labor, demographics, regional, poverty, trade, R&D). Dataset codes like 'nama_10_gdp', 'une_rt_a' pass through as series_id.
Not a publisher — provenance marker indicating an interim fallback while primary publisher coverage is built. Author MUST replace with a real publisher token before run.
FAO root-level token (non-FAOSTAT FAO publications). FAOSTAT-specific dataflows go through faostat publisher. Fetcher TBD.

Food Balance Sheets (FBS) bulk JSON/CSV API. Computes import-share of domestic supply (Grand Total quantity, tonnes) per country-year as the canonical food self-sufficiency proxy. Cuba area_code=32. Tested window 2010-2023.

Manual-drop publisher. Cloudflare JS challenge blocks all automated paths (plain requests 403, curl_cffi Chrome TLS 403, Playwright plain 403+CF-redirect, Playwright+stealth loads landing but dataset page exposes zero xlsx/download-action links in rendered HTML). Users download the master xlsx manually from https://www.fraserinstitute.org/economic-freedom/dataset and drop it into data/manual/fraser_efw/ with Fraser's own filename convention (e.g. efotw-YYYY-master-index-data-for-researchers-iso.xlsx). The fetcher picks the latest-filename match. Annual refresh cadence means quarterly manual maintenance is sustainable. Re-probe for automated path (Zenrows / playwright click-through) when convenient.
ALFRED provides vintage-tracked releases; real-time data. Free API key registration.
Political rights + civil liberties ratings. Mainstream-citable axis.

Landing page renders but data links are JS-injected; static scrape returns no download URLs. Deferred to scrape round.
MANUAL-DROP pattern: drop file(s) into data/manual/gastat/ and call data.fetchers.gastat.fetch().
US General Social Survey microdata. Used in trust / social-cohesion hypotheses. Fetcher TBD.

PDF table extracted via pdfplumber from Cato Working Paper #8 (Hanke & Krus 2012). JHU-hosted original returns 403; Cato mirror ships the identical table. Parser captures 30/53 episodes with fully-structured fields; 23 episodes with footnote markers / special characters are retained as raw lines in a `country_raw` column for manual cleanup (data is present; only regex refinement needed). Post-2012 episodes (Venezuela 2016-2019, Lebanon 2019-2023 near-threshold) require manual supplementation documented in hypotheses/monetary/hyperinflation_fiscal_dominance_coding.md.

Manual compilation required. Monthly parallel-market inflation for post-2012 hyperinflation episodes (Venezuela 2016-2019, Lebanon 2019-2023, Turkey 2021-2023 near-threshold) supplementing the 2012 Hanke-Krus catalogue. CSV format: country_iso3,year,month,monthly_inflation_pct,source.
Private consulting estimates of Cuban remittances. Used as cross-check against World Bank remittance prices. Tier 4 — single-firm estimate. Manual.

Heritage www.heritage.org main domain blocks automated access (Cloudflare). The static.heritage.org subdomain ships the data xlsx cleanly at /index/data/<year>/<year>_indexofeconomicfreedom_data.xlsx even without Chrome fingerprint. Parallel axis to Fraser EFW for multi-source disagreement surfacing.
Period and cohort fertility series. Free registration required. Fetcher TBD.
Long-run period and cohort life tables. Free registration required. Fetcher TBD.
ICE market data (energy, FX, credit). Subscription. Manual snapshots.
ICIJ Offshore Leaks combined database (Panama, Paradise, Pandora). Bulk CSV. Used in capital-flight / wealth-tax-avoidance hypotheses. Fetcher TBD.

IEA energy statistics. Most core IEA data is paywalled; the free public datasets (Energy Prices, Fossil-Fuel Subsidies, CO2 Highlights) sit behind Cloudflare gating that blocks plain HTTP fetches. MANUAL-DROP pattern: drop the IEA-published CSV/XLSX into data/manual/iea/<series_id>/ and call data.fetchers.iea.fetch(series_id). Supported series: industrial_electricity_price, fossil_subsidies_estimate, co2_emissions_from_fuel_combustion.
ILO root-level token (not the ILOSTAT-specific endpoint). Reserved for non-ILOSTAT ILO publications (IRLEX, ILO Department reports). Fetcher TBD.
Labor indicators across 180+ countries. Broader non-OECD coverage than OECD's own labor stats; essential for Singapore/Chile/developing- country comparators.

Three xlsx files hosted on ilzetzki.com (via Wix CDN): era_classification_monthly_1940_2019, unified_market_analysis_1946_2021, anchor_currency_monthly_1946_2019. Used as control in hyperinflation_requires_fiscal_dominance.

DataMapper JSON API — WEO indicators only. IFS, GFS, BOP, and Primary Commodity Prices will be added as separate fetcher methods on the same module; those datasets have their own APIs (SDMX + bulk CSV). Country filter on URL path is ignored by the API; client-side post-filter used.

IMF deprecated all public SDMX endpoints in 2024 in favour of Power BI Embedded at data.imf.org. There is no programmatic API. This fetcher reads bulk CSV/XLSX exports from data/manual/imf_ifs/. Users sign in to data.imf.org once, export the CSV for the relevant IFS / BOP / AREAER / FSI dataset, and drop the file into the manual directory. Supports IFS series (FIDR_PA, FIGB_PA, FMA_USD), BOP/IIP (BFOAFA, BFXFA), AREAER, and FSI series that are NOT in the WEO DataMapper.

PCPS commodity prices (oil, gas, metals, agricultural) via the IMF DataMapper JSON API. Shares the WEO endpoint shape (values -> series -> region -> period). Used for resource-extraction, nationalisation, and fiscal-dominance case studies. Monthly series supported where published; falls back to annual.

INDEC series accessed through the Argentine open-data portal (apis.datos.gob.ar/series) which aggregates INDEC with other public agencies. INDEC CPI and GDP-deflator data 2007-2015 are considered falsified (Kirchner-era intervention); tier 2 reflects that historical credibility problem. Post-2016 data (Macri-reconstructed methodology) is treated as tier 1 by most users.

INDEC consumer price index — separate token from generic indec because hyperinflation hypotheses cite the IPC series specifically. 2007-2015 vintage tier-2 (falsified). Fetcher TBD; may be served via existing argentina.py.
Spanish national statistics. JSON Tempus3 API (DATOS_TABLA / DATOS_SERIE). Fetcher exposes a curated catalogue (IPC, EPA, CNTR, ECV) and accepts raw table/serie codes via function/code overrides.
French national statistics. BDM SDMX API; free API key. Fetcher TBD.
European VC/PE association statistics. Annual yearbook PDF/XLSX. Fetcher TBD.
IOM Migration Data Portal. Fetcher TBD.

OData v4 JSON API. ValoresSerie(SERCODIGO=...) returns per-period rows with VALDATA + VALVALOR. Curated SUPPORTED covers IPCA inflation, monthly GDP, statutory minimum wage, PNAD Contínua unemployment, and Bolsa Família coverage. Raw SERCODIGOs may be passed through directly.

IRENA Renewable Capacity Statistics via PxWeb (PC-Axis) JSON-stat 2.0 API. Cycle suffix in table names (RECAP_<YEAR>_cycle<N>.px) bumps annually; fetcher tries the latest known cycles in order. LCOE series (lcoe_solar_pv, lcoe_wind_onshore) and any PxWeb failure fall back to MANUAL-DROP under data/manual/irena/ — drop the latest Renewable Power Generation Costs or Renewable Capacity Statistics XLSX/CSV there. License treated as unknown per IESET schema (IRENA terms = "free for use with attribution").
Israeli national statistics. Fetcher TBD.
Italian national statistics. SDMX 2.1 API. Fetcher TBD.
Generic placeholder used in regulatory-friction hypotheses for commercial IT-product databases (e.g. App Store / Play Store snapshots). Concrete vendor TBD per hypothesis.
ITU ICT indicators. Fetcher TBD.
Emerging-market sovereign bond spread index. Subscription. Manual snapshot expected.
Generic JP Morgan research-note token. Manual extracts cited per-hypothesis.
17-country macrofinancial dataset 1870-present. Release 6 (2024). GDP, inflation, rates, money aggregates, bank assets, credit, asset prices, housing. Essential for long-run monetary hypotheses.
KIPO patent statistics. Fetcher TBD.

Static academic replication tables from Morris Kleiner + Alan Krueger (BLS / NBER 2006-2013) and the Hamilton Project / Brookings 2015 update. Single-shot CSV download with manual-drop fallback under data/manual/kleiner_krueger/<series_id>.csv since Brookings has re-pathed the report PDF twice since 2015. Headline series: state-year licensing share of workforce (~50 states x 1983-2015), wage premium for licensed vs unlicensed within occupations, historical 1950-2008 occupation-licensing growth, and the 2015 single-year cross-section. Cite Kleiner-Krueger (2010, 2013) and Kleiner (2015, Hamilton Project).
Hungarian national statistics. Web-table downloads, programmatic access TBD.
Bolt & van Zanden 2020. Long-run real GDP per capita from year 1 for some economies, broad coverage post-1500.
Not a publisher — provenance marker indicating the variable was manually transcribed from a primary source documented per-cell. Used in case-study YAMLs.
Generic finance-ministry token used in multiple LatAm hypotheses (Peru, Panama, etc.). Concrete country resolution happens at hypothesis-wiring time. Endpoint TBD.

Mercatus Center / QuantGov RegData — US federal regulatory restrictiveness via binding-language word counts in the CFR plus Federal Register annual page counts. QuantGov does not advertise stable direct CSV URLs, so the fetcher probes a candidate list (versioned static URL, WP-uploads URL, GitHub mirror) and falls back to manual drop in data/manual/mercatus/<series_id>.csv if all candidates 404. Open-data terms in practice but mapped to 'unknown' since the schema enum lacks open_data. Re-confirm canonical URLs against the QuantGov landing page on annual refresh.
Not a publisher — provenance marker indicating the variable is built from a unit-record microdata extract (LIS, IPUMS, restricted-access census). Underlying source documented per hypothesis.
Cuban Ministry of Agriculture. Used for libreta-rationing and food-self-sufficiency hypotheses. Fetcher TBD.
French finance ministry open-data portal. ISF/IFI tax base, recettes fiscales. Fetcher TBD.
Russian Ministry of Finance fiscal statistics. Fetcher TBD.
Hungarian central bank. Bulk XLSX downloads on statistics page. Fetcher TBD.

Pre-1929 US macro (industrial production, unemployment, money stock, pig-iron, freight carloadings) compiled by NBER from US public-domain statistical sources. Strategy: prefer FRED mirror (M*NNBR series IDs) for series available there; fall back to direct CSV downloads from data.nber.org/databases/macrohistory/rectdata/ for series with no mirror. Series IDs are namespaced nber_us_* to avoid collision with FRED bare IDs. Requires FRED_API_KEY for mirrored series.
Hand-curated event chronology pulled from press archives (Reuters/AP/local) for case-study hypotheses. Each entry carries a per-event citation; treated as tier 4 evidence.
VIIRS night-lights monthly composites (Earth Observation Group, Colorado School of Mines). Used as activity proxy in opaque-data regimes. Fetcher TBD.
PitchBook-NVCA Venture Monitor PDF + XLSX. Quarterly. Fetcher TBD; manual drop expected.

SDMX 2.1 API via the new Data Explorer. Client passes full dataflow identifier ('AGENCY,DATAFLOW_ID,VERSION') as series_id, with optional SDMX key filter. Covers CPI (DSD_PRICES), KEI, IDD (Gini), EPL. PMR lives at `oecd_pmr`.

Thin wrapper around data.fetchers.oecd scoped to the PMR dataflows (OECD.ECO.GCRD,DSD_PMR@DF_PMR,1.2). Separate namespace so PMR's regulatory-channel data keeps its own vintage history distinct from general OECD economic indicators (invariant 4, channel separation).
Cuban national statistics office. Annual statistical yearbook (AEC) PDF/XLS releases. Fetcher TBD; may overlap with cuba_manual drops.

UK ONS legacy timeseries JSON endpoint (www.ons.gov.uk/timeseries/<cdid>/<dataset>/data). Each series is identified by a CDID + dataset pair (e.g. ABMI/UKEA for chained-volume GDP, D7BT/MM23 for CPI, MGSX/LMS for ILO unemployment). Pairs registered in data/fetchers/ons.py SUPPORTED; pass dataset=<code> kwarg to fetch additional series ad hoc. Beta API at api.beta.ons.gov.uk used only for catalogue browsing.
UN-Habitat urban indicators data hub. Fetcher TBD.

All probed URLs (asb.opec.org/data/ASB_Data.xlsx, PDF paths, landing) returned 403. OPEC's CDN blocks automated fetchers regardless of UA/Referer. Deferred to scrape round.
MANUAL-DROP pattern: drop file(s) into data/manual/opec/ and call data.fetchers.opec.fetch().

Practical bridge for publishers whose primary machine-access paths are blocked (Transparency CPI, World Happiness Report, Gallup-derived trust, some WVS aggregates). series_id is the grapher slug. CC-BY-4.0 with attribution flowback to the original publisher.
Venezuelan state oil company. Production, exports, refining capacity. Self-reported and patchy post-2015; cross-check against OPEC and IEA. Fetcher TBD.
Mexican state oil company financials and production. Fetcher TBD.
Private-market deal and valuation database. Subscription only. Manual extracts.
Regime authority scores 1800-present. Parallel axis to V-Dem for institutional-quality robustness.
Not a publisher — provenance marker indicating the variable is a proxy whose mapping to the latent construct is documented in the coding doc.
Manual-drop (GGDC xlsx URLs 404 on automated; browser-download required). 183 countries 1950-2019, productivity + capital stocks + TFP + PPP. Drop pwt1001.xlsx into data/manual/pwt/.

RBA serves XLSX tables cleanly via curl_cffi with Chrome TLS fingerprint; plain requests receive 403. URL pattern: /statistics/tables/xls/<code>hist.xlsx (e.g. d03hist.xlsx for D3 Monetary Aggregates).
Zimbabwean central bank. Used in 2007-2009 hyperinflation case study. Tier 3; cross-check against Hanke. Fetcher TBD.
Curated Reuters / AP event-chronology citations used in case-study YAMLs. No bulk feed; per-event citation only. Tier 4 narrative evidence.
Swedish central bank — SWEA REST API. Policy rate, FX, monetary aggregates. Fetcher TBD.
Russian national statistics. Tier 3 post-2022; cross-check against external estimates (CBR, BIS). Fetcher TBD.

All direct endpoint attempts returned 404 — SAMA reshuffled URLs and the reports section requires JS navigation. Data is public but requires headless-browser scrape. Deferred to scrape round.
MANUAL-DROP pattern: drop file(s) into data/manual/sama/ and call data.fetchers.sama.fetch().

Swedish national statistics — PxWeb JSON-stat 2.0 API. POST per-table endpoint with a query body; no auth, CC0 licence. Supported aliases: cpi (PR/PR0101/PR0101A/KPItotM), gdp (NR/NR0103/NR0103A/NR0103ENS2010T01A), population (BE/BE0101/BE0101A/BefolkningNy), unemployment (AM/AM0401/AM0401A/NAKUBefolkning2Ny). Bare table paths fall back to a wildcard query built from table metadata.
Static XLS downloads (ie_data.xls for S&P + CAPE + long rate; Fig3-1.xls for long home-price index). Requires xlrd for legacy .xls parsing.

Needed for welfare_architecture_comparative_effectiveness.
MANUAL-DROP pattern: drop file(s) into data/manual/singapore_cpf/ and call data.fetchers.singapore_cpf.fetch().

Needed for singapore_mediShield_vs_us_outcomes_comparison.
MANUAL-DROP pattern: drop file(s) into data/manual/singapore_moh/ and call data.fetchers.singapore_moh.fetch().
Military spending 1948-present, 170+ countries. Constant USD, current USD, % GDP, per-capita variants on separate sheets.

Norwegian national statistics — PXWeb JSON-stat 2.0 API. POST per-table endpoint (/en/table/<id>/) with a query body; no auth. NLOD 2.0 licence (treated as cc_by_4_0 in this registry). Supported aliases: GDP (09190), formuesskatt_base (04476 — wealth-tax base), skatteinntekter (12404 — general-government tax revenue), utvandring (05753 — immigration/emigration by citizenship). Bare table ids fall back to a wildcard query built from table metadata.
WDS JSON POST API. Queried by numeric vectorId (e.g. 41552796 for Canada M2 gross). getDataFromVectorsAndLatestNPeriods endpoint.

El Salvador central bank. Monetary, banking, FX, real-sector statistics. No public REST/SDMX API; data ships as PDF reports + Excel sheets linked from publication pages and the regulaciones/upload_files file repository (URLs rotate per release vintage). Manual-drop pattern: user downloads latest workbook and places under data/manual/sv_bcr/ using the series prefix (pib_real_quarterly, inflation_cpi, fdi_inflows, monetary_aggregates). El Salvador has been dollarised since 2001 so all monetary aggregates are USD-denominated.
MANUAL-DROP pattern: drop file(s) into data/manual/sv_bcr/ and call data.fetchers.sv_bcr.fetch(series_id=...).
El Salvador property and commercial registry. Used for housing/title-formalisation hypotheses. Endpoint TBD.
El Salvador tourism ministry. Visitor arrivals, tourism receipts. Fetcher TBD.
El Salvador police homicide and crime statistics. Used in Bukele crackdown / mass-incarceration hypotheses. Fetcher TBD; cross-check against UNODC.

Needed for switzerland_mixed_insurance_vs_us_comparison.
MANUAL-DROP pattern: drop file(s) into data/manual/swiss_fso/ and call data.fetchers.swiss_fso.fetch().

Healthcare outcome data for Swiss mixed-insurance comparator.
MANUAL-DROP pattern: drop file(s) into data/manual/swiss_obsan/ and call data.fetchers.swiss_obsan.fetch().
Turkish central bank EVDS data API. Free key registration. Used in Erdogan-era policy-rate hypotheses. Graceful no-auth fallback returns placeholder frame in dev.

transparencycdn.org returns 403 on direct XLSX even with full browser session. Available via OWID mirror (publisher=owid, series=ti-corruption-perception-index) for interim use.
MANUAL-DROP pattern: drop file(s) into data/manual/transparency_cpi/ and call data.fetchers.transparency_cpi.fetch().

Turkish national statistics. CPI methodology disputes 2021-2023 — cross-check against ENAGrup independent index. HTTP-first fetch via biruni.tuik.gov.tr indicator API with manual-drop fallback under data/manual/tuik/.
Conflict events 1989-present, geocoded, actor-classified. Used for state-capacity + stability axes.
UN bilateral merchandise-trade database. Free key with quota. Fetcher TBD.

Citation-backed seed panel for VEN+CUB origin migrant stock derived from UN DESA IMS 2020 + UNHCR R4V 2021-2023 + Pew/MPI Cuba supplement. Manual XLSX drop into data/manual/un_desa/ supported but not required; seed panel emitted unconditionally so the fetcher is deterministic.
UN IGME child-mortality estimates. Annual XLSX. Fetcher TBD.
UN DESA Population Division WPP. Bulk CSV. Fetcher TBD.

UNCTAD trade and FDI statistics. Bulk CSV downloads from unctadstat-api.unctad.org. SUPPORTED series_ids in the fetcher module (US.FDI, US.FDIstock, US.TradeMerchTotal, US.TradeServ, US.GVCParticipation).
HDI composite + life expectancy + education + GNI per capita. Canonical QoL composite index.

Annual refugee, asylum-seeker, IDP, and stateless population by country. Free API, no key required. Data from 1975 for global totals, 2000+ for most country-level series. Gold standard for forced displacement statistics.

Crime and criminal-justice statistics (intentional homicide, violent and sexual crime, corruption/bribery, prison population) from the UNODC CTS (Crime Trend Survey). Bulk XLSX downloads from dataunodc.un.org; no auth required. UNODC has reshuffled URLs multiple times — if a fetch returns 404 check https://dataunodc.un.org/data for current download links and update SERIES_MAP. Canonical cross-country source for the crime axis (parallels OWID mirror of the same UNODC data for disagreement surfacing).
UNU-WIDER GRD (Government Revenue Dataset) and WIID. Fetcher TBD.

US Census Bureau Data API. ACS 5-year, Population Estimates, SAIPE, CPS ASEC, EITS Building Permits, International Trade. Free key recommended (CENSUS_API_KEY env var) but most endpoints work without one.
US CBP encounter and apprehension statistics. Used in migration hypotheses. Fetcher TBD.
USCIS immigration filings statistics. Fetcher TBD.

Sourced from the vdeminstitute/vdemdata GitHub mirror (RData format; pyreadr dependency required). v-dem.net itself gates downloads behind a front-end flow; the R-package mirror is open and stable. Covers institutional-quality axes (judicial independence, regime type, academic freedom, movement freedom, etc.) back to 1789.
WFP food-security indicators (Hunger Map, market prices). Fetcher TBD.
Accessed via World Bank v2 API with source=3. Indicator codes were migrated to the `GOV_WGI_` prefix in 2024 (e.g. GOV_WGI_GE.EST for Government Effectiveness point estimate).
OData API. Global health indicators (life expectancy, mortality, DALYs, health expenditure). Non-commercial license (cite + attribute).
Manual-drop (bulk download URLs 403/404 on automated; browser flow required). Top income + wealth shares, labor share, per-country bulk CSVs.
WIPO IP statistics — patent, trademark, design filings. Fetcher TBD.

WJP downloads page returns minimal-content HTML (6.5 KB) even with Playwright + stealth + 5s wait. Data links are loaded via AJAX only after user interaction. Main rule-of-law-index page renders 19.5 MB but contains zero xlsx refs. Likely requires simulated click-through in headless browser or manual one-shot capture. Interim: institutional.rule_of_law axis is already covered by WGI + V-Dem which are ready; WJP is the 3rd source for disagreement-surfacing.
Firm-level cross-country survey on business climate, regulatory burden, finance access. Fetcher TBD.
Quarterly remittance-corridor cost survey. Bulk CSV. Fetcher TBD.
Primary cross-country panel source for controls and long-run outcomes.
WTO trade statistics portal. Fetcher TBD.
Argentine state-controlled oil company financials. Used in nationalisation case studies. Fetcher TBD.

ready_unmaterialized_historical.notes: Manual-drop (GGDC xlsx URLs 404 on automated; browser-download required). 183 countries 1950-2019, productivity + capital stocks + TFP + PPP. Drop pwt1001.xlsx into data/manual/pwt/.

materialized_sorted_by_earliest_year.notes: Practical bridge for publishers whose primary machine-access paths are blocked (Transparency CPI, World Happiness Report, Gallup-derived trust, some WVS aggregates). series_id is the grapher slug. CC-BY-4.0 with attribution flowback to the original publisher.
Bolt & van Zanden 2020. Long-run real GDP per capita from year 1 for some economies, broad coverage post-1500.
Stats.bis.org SDMX 2.1 v2 API with CSV output. Client passes dataflow name as series_id (WS_SPP, WS_LONG_PP, WS_EER, WS_TC). Full dataflow fetched by default; optional SDMX dot-path key narrows.
ALFRED provides vintage-tracked releases; real-time data. Free API key registration.
Regime authority scores 1800-present. Parallel axis to V-Dem for institutional-quality robustness.

Sourced from the vdeminstitute/vdemdata GitHub mirror (RData format; pyreadr dependency required). v-dem.net itself gates downloads behind a front-end flow; the R-package mirror is open and stable. Covers institutional-quality axes (judicial independence, regime type, academic freedom, movement freedom, etc.) back to 1789.

DataMapper JSON API — WEO indicators only. IFS, GFS, BOP, and Primary Commodity Prices will be added as separate fetcher methods on the same module; those datasets have their own APIs (SDMX + bulk CSV). Country filter on URL path is ignored by the API; client-side post-filter used.
Manual-drop (bulk download URLs 403/404 on automated; browser flow required). Top income + wealth shares, labor share, per-country bulk CSVs.
17-country macrofinancial dataset 1870-present. Release 6 (2024). GDP, inflation, rates, money aggregates, bank assets, credit, asset prices, housing. Essential for long-run monetary hypotheses.
Static XLS downloads (ie_data.xls for S&P + CAPE + long rate; Fig3-1.xls for long home-price index). Requires xlrd for legacy .xls parsing.

Pre-1929 US macro (industrial production, unemployment, money stock, pig-iron, freight carloadings) compiled by NBER from US public-domain statistical sources. Strategy: prefer FRED mirror (M*NNBR series IDs) for series available there; fall back to direct CSV downloads from data.nber.org/databases/macrohistory/rectdata/ for series with no mirror. Series IDs are namespaced nber_us_* to avoid collision with FRED bare IDs. Requires FRED_API_KEY for mirrored series.
OData API. Global health indicators (life expectancy, mortality, DALYs, health expenditure). Non-commercial license (cite + attribute).

OData v4 JSON API. ValoresSerie(SERCODIGO=...) returns per-period rows with VALDATA + VALVALOR. Curated SUPPORTED covers IPCA inflation, monthly GDP, statutory minimum wage, PNAD Contínua unemployment, and Bolsa Família coverage. Raw SERCODIGOs may be passed through directly.

UK ONS legacy timeseries JSON endpoint (www.ons.gov.uk/timeseries/<cdid>/<dataset>/data). Each series is identified by a CDID + dataset pair (e.g. ABMI/UKEA for chained-volume GDP, D7BT/MM23 for CPI, MGSX/LMS for ILO unemployment). Pairs registered in data/fetchers/ons.py SUPPORTED; pass dataset=<code> kwarg to fetch additional series ad hoc. Beta API at api.beta.ons.gov.uk used only for catalogue browsing.
Military spending 1948-present, 170+ countries. Constant USD, current USD, % GDP, per-capita variants on separate sheets.
JSON-stat 2.0 API. EU27 deep coverage across 200+ datasets (labor, demographics, regional, poverty, trade, R&D). Dataset codes like 'nama_10_gdp', 'une_rt_a' pass through as series_id.

Norwegian national statistics — PXWeb JSON-stat 2.0 API. POST per-table endpoint (/en/table/<id>/) with a query body; no auth. NLOD 2.0 licence (treated as cc_by_4_0 in this registry). Supported aliases: GDP (09190), formuesskatt_base (04476 — wealth-tax base), skatteinntekter (12404 — general-government tax revenue), utvandring (05753 — immigration/emigration by citizenship). Bare table ids fall back to a wildcard query built from table metadata.
Primary cross-country panel source for controls and long-run outcomes.

Swedish national statistics — PxWeb JSON-stat 2.0 API. POST per-table endpoint with a query body; no auth, CC0 licence. Supported aliases: cpi (PR/PR0101/PR0101A/KPItotM), gdp (NR/NR0103/NR0103A/NR0103ENS2010T01A), population (BE/BE0101/BE0101A/BefolkningNy), unemployment (AM/AM0401/AM0401A/NAKUBefolkning2Ny). Bare table paths fall back to a wildcard query built from table metadata.

De jure capital-account-openness index built from four IMF AREAER binary indicators (multiple FX, current-acct restrictions, capital-acct restrictions, surrender of export proceeds). 2023 release covers 1970-2023, ~180 economies. Stata .dta format. Falls back to manual drop at data/manual/chinn_ito/ if the PDX host is unavailable. Mirrored by OWID as `owid:capital-account-openness` — this entry is the canonical upstream.
IADB CSV endpoint. Requires browser-shaped User-Agent (Akamai check). Series codes like LPMAUYM (M4, monthly).

Annual refugee, asylum-seeker, IDP, and stateless population by country. Free API, no key required. Data from 1975 for global totals, 2000+ for most country-level series. Gold standard for forced displacement statistics.
Conflict events 1989-present, geocoded, actor-classified. Used for state-capacity + stability axes.

Citation-backed seed panel for VEN+CUB origin migrant stock derived from UN DESA IMS 2020 + UNHCR R4V 2021-2023 + Pew/MPI Cuba supplement. Manual XLSX drop into data/manual/un_desa/ supported but not required; seed panel emitted unconditionally so the fetcher is deterministic.
HDI composite + life expectancy + education + GNI per capita. Canonical QoL composite index.
Labor indicators across 180+ countries. Broader non-OECD coverage than OECD's own labor stats; essential for Singapore/Chile/developing- country comparators.

SDMX 2.1 CSV API. Ships euro-area aggregate flows cleanly (BSI M3/M2 for U2, EXR bilateral rates, MIR interest rates). National- contribution keys (e.g. REF_AREA=DE for national M2 contribution) require per-country resolution against the live constraint set; resolve at hypothesis-wiring time.
Spanish national statistics. JSON Tempus3 API (DATOS_TABLA / DATOS_SERIE). Fetcher exposes a curated catalogue (IPC, EPA, CNTR, ECV) and accepts raw table/serie codes via function/code overrides.
Accessed via World Bank v2 API with source=3. Indicator codes were migrated to the `GOV_WGI_` prefix in 2024 (e.g. GOV_WGI_GE.EST for Government Effectiveness point estimate).
Venezuelan central bank monetary aggregates. Post-2016 publications became sporadic; Hanke and DolarToday are credibility checks. Tier 3 reflects regime-era reliability concerns.
US EIA Open Data API v2 (JSON). Energy production, consumption, prices, electricity, petroleum. Free API key required.

Food Balance Sheets (FBS) bulk JSON/CSV API. Computes import-share of domestic supply (Grand Total quantity, tonnes) per country-year as the canonical food self-sufficiency proxy. Cuba area_code=32. Tested window 2010-2023.

US Census Bureau Data API. ACS 5-year, Population Estimates, SAIPE, CPS ASEC, EITS Building Permits, International Trade. Free key recommended (CENSUS_API_KEY env var) but most endpoints work without one.

EU environmental indicators. Two series wired: eu_ets_verified_emissions (data hub item 9d3fbb4f-...) and greenhouse_gas_inventory (4b8d1744-...). Bulk CSVs ship from sdi.eea.europa.eu / discomap; fetcher tries an ordered candidate list and falls back to a bootstrap-stub row if all URLs are unreachable (extra.bootstrap=True flag for auditability).
US Labor deep: detailed CPI, PPI, employment by industry/state, earnings, productivity. Optional free API key via BLS_API_KEY env var for higher rate limits.
